components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #e8829a; color: #fff; padding: 10px 28px; border-radius: 999px; font-weight: 700; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(232, 130, 154, 0.3); }

components.name: Project Card
components.html:
Project Title

Description goes here.
components.css: .ds-project-card { background: #ffffff; border-radius: 24px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(220,100,130,0.12); border: 1.5px solid #fce8f0; transition: transform 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s; } .ds-project-card:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); box-shadow: 0 12px 36px rgba(100,140,220,0.2); } .ds-card-thumb { aspect-ratio: 16/9; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fce8f0, #f4b8c8); } .ds-card-body { padding: 20px; }

narrative.overview: The design system balances precise, systematic game development with a soft, inviting aesthetic.
dos: Do use clamp() for major headlines
